title: Nide's sawmill
description: Datapack that adds the ability to make wooden items on a stonecutter
body:
This datapack allows you to work at a stonecutter as at a sawmill.

The datapack has support for all vanilla wood up to version 1.20, and will also have support for mod wood in the future.

Mods are currently supported:
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty)

There are plans to support the following mods:
- [Let's Do: Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/vinery)
- [Oh The Biomes You'll Go](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo)
- [Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
- [Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
